institution.name: Southern University and A & M College

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Southern University and A & M College are 8% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($43.4k vs $47.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southern University and A & M College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (31.9% → 27.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern University and A & M College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.2% → 0.0%).
